text:
TheWeightOfLives is the 3rd track on theDOGS, 4th and final track on the original soundtrack of the film, Attack on Titan Part 2: Jiyuu no Tsubasa, and 12th track on track 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Musical motifs

The begins with a remix of the second part of 進撃st-hrn-egt20130629巨人 (0:00-2:35), before incorporating the theDOGS chorus (2:47-3:37) and ostinato (3:52-4:20, 4:36-50, 5:57-6:12 and 6:41-7:11).
